summary: A solid capture of a rainy summer‑tour show featuring an ethereal “Box of Rain” and raucous “Iko Iko,” with clear close‑up sound.
review: The reviewer praises the performance, highlighting “Row Jimmy,” “China Doll,” an ethereal “Box of Rain,” and a raucous “Iko Iko.” While no explicit recording details are given, the tapers receive thanks for a job well done, suggesting the audio is at least listenable and fairly clear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one enthusiastic 4‑star review; strong show praise but no concrete recording details, so rating leans on performance quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on soundboard vs. audience; reviewer notes the band sounded surprisingly close, implying a clear capture despite lack of detail.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Rain‑soaked summer tour vibe with a mix of ethereal ballads and high‑energy numbers, moving smoothly between moods.
